task objective: Implement SteamOS icon fallback and diagnostics
design decisions: Updated _xbox_cropper_name to return appropriate modes based on Pillow availability and OS name. Ensured powershell crop paths are gated behind os.name == 'nt'. Added graceful fallback to write uncropped raw image when cropper is 'none' or Pillow raises an exception. Isolated loopback proxy failures by logging unavailable modes without blocking achievement fetch. Updated get_platform_capabilities to expose icon_mode based on crop status and transport availability.
results: All tests passed and quality gates verified successfully.
